modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty recording narration in PowerPoint.

full_description_text:  
The user is attempting to record narration in PowerPoint but is facing challenges. They are unsure of the steps required to successfully complete this task. This issue is causing frustration as they seek to enhance their presentation with audio.
description: The user is attempting to record narration in PowerPoint but is facing challenges. They are unsure of the steps required to successfully complete this task. This issue is causing frustration as they seek to enhance their presentation with audio.
